title: Social Media Manager
desc: Managed end-to-end social media operations for multiple clients and brands at Nuke IT Marketing Agency.
Planned and executed content strategies to drive organic growth and engagement.
Created content calendars and managed end-to-end content execution.
Analysed social media performance and optimized content using data-driven insights.
Conducted audience, competitor, and trend research to identify content opportunities and improve campaign performance.
Coordinated with creative teams to ensure timely content delivery.

Successfully grew the personal brand of Mr. Chandru (Co-founder, Mr. Golisoda) from 6.5K to 10K+ followers in just 28 days through strategic content planning, audience engagement, and social media optimization.

title: Video Jockey & Content Writer
desc: Hosted events and interviews with diverse audience engagement.
Created emotionally engaging and informative scripts on trending topics.
Wrote for YouTube videos, reels, and Instagram posts with audience focus.
Maintained tone and timing in line with show format.
Collaborated with editors to align voice and visuals.
